items.title: VVD header earns Liverpool last-gasp derby win
items.summary: Virgil van Dijk scored a stoppage-time header to win the first Merseyside derby and boost Liverpool's hopes of securing Champions League football next season.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Shelton stops Cobolli to win Munich Open title
items.summary: Ben Shelton bounced back from disappointment last year by defeating Flavio Cobolli 6-2, 7-5 to win the Munich Open.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
